name: Hot Oriental Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 Celery stalks, cut into julienne strips
3/4 cup Spinach, washed and torn in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add garlic and ginger; sauté until the garlic is lightly browned.
3. Add celery; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
4. Add cabbage and mushrooms; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
5. Add spinach; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Add soy sauce and toss to coat the vegetables.
7. Serve immediately.
